3286160.name: Liquor Store Simulator Demo
3286160.description:
🛒 Demo Overview

In the demo, you begin with a modest store acquired on credit. Your responsibilities include purchasing stock, arranging products, and managing day-to-day operations to attract customers and generate revenue. The gameplay emphasizes strategic planning and efficient management to grow your business.

🔒 Demo Limitations

While the demo provides a substantial glimpse into the game's mechanics, certain features are restricted compared to the full version:

  • Store Progression: The store's development is capped at level 5, concluding the demo upon reaching this milestone.

  • Available Upgrades: Only the initial licenses for beer, wine, and spirits are accessible, limiting the range of products you can offer.

  • Disabled Features: Advanced functionalities such as hiring assistants, advertising campaigns, securing loans, and other management tools are not available in the demo.
3286160.supported_languages: 英语, 俄语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 韩语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 简体中文, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 繁体中文, 越南语
